description: Health Canada approved erdafitinib for the treatment of adult patients with locally advanced unresectable or metastatic urothelial carcinoma (UC) harboring susceptible FGFR3 genetic alterations, who have experienced disease progression during or after at least one line of prior therapy, including within 12 months of neoadjuvant or adjuvant therapy.

contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute

indication.indication: BALVERSA (erdafitinib) is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with locally advanced unresectable or metastatic urothelial carcinoma (UC), harbouring susceptible fibroblast growth factor receptor (FGFR)3 genetic alterations, who have disease progression during or following at least one line of prior therapy including within 12 months of neoadjuvant or adjuvant therapy.
indication.description: Health Canada approved erdafitinib for the treatment of adult patients with locally advanced unresectable or metastatic urothelial carcinoma (UC) harboring susceptible FGFR3 genetic alterations, who have experienced disease progression during or after at least one line of prior therapy, including within 12 months of neoadjuvant or adjuvant therapy.
